/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libaltair_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libaltair_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/altair_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/altair_interfaces/msg/detail/can_status__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/altair_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/altair_interfaces/msg/detail/mdd_feedback__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/altair_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/altair_interfaces/msg/detail/mdd_command__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/altair_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/altair_interfaces/msg/detail/servo_command__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/altair_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/altair_interfaces/msg/detail/solenoid_command__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/altair_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/altair_interfaces/srv/detail/trigger_control__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/altair_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/altair_interfaces/srv/detail/get_available_ports__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/altair_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/altair_interfaces/srv/detail/connect_can__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/altair_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/altair_interfaces/srv/detail/start_behavior__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
